creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed Dec 27 13:24:15  2023 UTC, ale@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> (In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #16)
> @glebius, I see two messages from you without any content or attachment. Did you
> want to say/send something?

I'm very sorry, I was testing my patches to pybugz and
accidentially submitted a comment. :0

I actually have this bug open and I want to take a look at
later today or tomorrow. It was not a random bug I used to
test pybugz!
